We have revoked it to protect your data from unauthorized access, and as a consequence, any app using this token won't be able to authenticate to GitHub.

Review any unauthorized applications and remove any you don't recognize: https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/keeping-your-account-and-data-secure/reviewing-your-authorized-integrations#reviewing-your-authorized-github-apps

74577.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/f8aa074e4d9a77492c789dcf86374fdeebef4ed8/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google

74573.subject: The Daily Degen - June 15th, 2026
74573.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-15th-2026

Happy Monday friends! All sorts of stuff going on!
Let’s dive in!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.376T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $742.84
Gold: $4,319.90
Silver: $69.88
Oil (WTI): $80.53
US 10Y Treasury: 4.469%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 26
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
While prices might be in goblintown, there are still untold defi teams getting after it and shipping hard and continuing to build the financial rails the global economy will one day run on!
A prime example are the dedicated gents at @rocksolidHQ [ https://substack.com/redirect/37a1d2dd-766f-4138-87f1-a49f24c39e9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
RockSolid is an extremely cool project built by co-founders Ben Ward @wardy_ben [ https://substack.com/redirect/533917d7-b7e3-423d-b89e-f2a51562dc62?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Steve Pack @paladin_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/b59ed299-bbc5-46bd-9b4b-dfbb2769890b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]… designed to bring the best yield-maxxing opportunities possible to the world of defi!
They now have two such vaults: a) the Rocksolid $rETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/51028703-cb68-4b9b-b189-1817e48afddb?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and b) the RockSolid AutoPlus Looped $ETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/0b530f67-4fb6-4405-980e-371728422781?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
If you want a great breakdown of everything RockSolid is doing, check out the interview RockSolid co-founder Steve Pack did with Sam Kamani for the Rocket Fuel podcast embedded below!
Also make sure to follow RockSolid on Twitter/X [ https://substack.com/redirect/37a1d2dd-766f-4138-87f1-a49f24c39e9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates as well, and stay tuned as we continue shining a light on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly green today. Top 25 chains up at least 20% on the monthly include Arbitrum (#3), Provenance (#10), Ink (#13), Near (#21), ENI (#22), and Stellar (#24). 
Protocols are mostly green today as well. Top 25 protocols up at least 20% on the monthly include Aave (#1), Sablier (#4), Figure Markets (#23), and Sentora (#25).

Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
